parameters.jsCode:
const { actions, ts } = $input.first().json; const newActions = actions.filter(a => a.is_new); const sevColor = { critical: '#c0392b', high: '#d35400', medium: '#d4ac0d', low: '#27ae60' }; const topSev = newActions.reduce((acc, a) => { const rank = { critical: 4, high: 3, medium: 2, low: 1 }; return (rank[a.sev] || 0) > (rank[acc] || 0) ? a.sev : acc; }, 'low'); const bannerColor = sevColor[topSev] || '#2c3e50'; let rows = ''; for (const a of newActions) { const sc = sevColor[a.sev] || '#666'; const encSubjectA = encodeURIComponent('APPROVE ' + a.action_id); const encBodyA = encodeURIComponent('APPROVE ' + a.action_id); const encSubjectR = encodeURIComponent('REJECT ' + a.action_id); const encBodyR = encodeURIComponent('REJECT ' + a.action_id); rows += ` ${a.sev.toUpperCase()} ${a.service} ${a.desc}
Proposed fix: ${a.proposed_fix || ''}
Action ID: ${a.action_id}
? APPROVE ? REJECT `; } const html = `
??

CHIEF OF STAFF - ALERT

${new Date(ts).toUTCString()}

${newActions.length} ISSUE${newActions.length !== 1 ? 'S' : ''} PENDING APPROVAL

Your automated systems have detected issues requiring your approval before any corrective action is taken.

${rows}
Severity Service Issue

Via Telegram: APPROVE cos-xxxxxxxx or REJECT cos-xxxxxxxx

Actions expire after 24 hours. Rejected/expired actions are logged only.

Chief of Staff � Bridge Digital Solution � Jarvis Automation Platform
`; const subject = '?? CoS Alert [' + topSev.toUpperCase() + ']: ' + newActions.map(a => a.service).join(', '); return [{ json: { send_to: 'gelsonmascarenhas@gmail.com', subject, html, action_count: newActions.length } }];
